exercises.title: Calculate Attention Weights
exercises.description: Given Q, K matrices, compute attention weights step-by-step
exercises.prompt:
Q = [[1, 0], [0, 1]]
K = [[1, 0], [0.5, 0.5], [-1, 1]]

Compute: softmax(Q·K^T / √2)

Show your work for both tokens' attention distributions.

exercises.title: Multi-Head Interpretation
exercises.description: Interpret what different attention heads might learn
exercises.prompt:
For the sentence 'The large red apple fell', describe what each attention head might focus on:
- Head 1: Syntax/structure
- Head 2: Semantic relationships
- Head 3: Long-range dependencies

exercises.title: Causal Masking
exercises.description: Apply causal masking to prevent future attention
exercises.prompt: For a 4-token sequence, show the attention mask matrix that prevents position i from attending to positions > i. What values go in the mask before softmax?

exercises.title: Gradient Flow Analysis
exercises.description: Understand why √d scaling matters for training
exercises.prompt:
Compare softmax outputs with and without √d scaling:
- Without: softmax([100, 200, 50])
- With: softmax([100/√3, 200/√3, 50/√3])

Why do gradients flow better with scaling?
